main.description: A Node — a place where quintessence naturally gathers and springs forth. Source of raw quintessence (meditate) and the anchor where tass crystallizes (tassilize).

location.description: Where in the world this Node sits

rating.description: Node background rating (1-5). Determines max quintessence capacity (rating * 5 by default).

ambientQuintessence.description: Current quintessence in the ambient pool. Defaults to rating * 5 if unset (a fresh, full node).

resonance.description: Resonance type (e.g. dynamic, static, primordial, pattern, questing)

tassForm.description: Coincidental form tass naturally takes at this Node (e.g. 'a silver coin', 'a vial of ink')

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this Node was minted
